ksa_text: Knowledge of enterprise board-level risk reporting and integration of data risk, AI risk, and technology risk into executive risk dashboards and board governance.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DG-K-002 (Data Governance/Knowledge) excluded as edge_case (composite 0.541, highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.541). Domain prior: in_scope. Core hits: 0. OOS hits: 1. Seniority: too_senior. ISO 8000 data quality management: data quality standards implementation, certification processes, ISO 8000 compliance oversight, data exchange standard management, and quality system governance.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: Exclude on Data Governance (in-scope prior) KSA with composite 0.541 and only 1 OOS signal(s). Similarly scored DG KSAs are typically included.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: Exclude upheld. Insufficient core signals (0) or excess OOS signals (1).

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this Data Governance KSA (composite 0.541)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis of ISO 8000 Data Manager job postings does not surface this Data Governance competency as a standard requirement at the relevant level. Exclusion consistent with role focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: KSA DG-K-002 (Data Governance/Knowledge) excluded as edge_case (composite 0.541, highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.541). Domain prior: in_scope. Core hits: 0. OOS hits: 1. Seniority: too_senior.
